One-click unsubscribe endpoint linked from the footer of every blast. Validates the HMAC token, flips customers.email_marketing_consent=FALSE, records the timestamp + source, then renders a tiny confirmation page.

POST /api/vendor-listings/create Vendor creates a new listing + its 3 traceability phases in one call. Status is forced to 'pending_approval'; admin approval generates the batch number + writes traceability_batches.

POST /api/vendors/signup Public vendor signup endpoint. Anyone (authenticated or not) can apply. Writes vendors row with approval_status='pending', then fans out a multi-channel notification to BSC admins.

GET /sw.js Dynamic service worker. Every Vercel deploy embeds a fresh build hash (or build-time fallback) into the SW body, so the byte content changes per deploy. Browsers compare the new bytes against the cached SW, s…

business_rules.detail: bill_casale_share = gross_profit × 0.05 on every sale. Never override.

wholesale_in_store 22% · wholesale_online 19% · online_retail 35% · nassau_pos 40% · andros_pos 40%. VAT comes from products.vat_category: 0% uncooked_food (default — covers raw seafood/produce/grocery), 10% cooked_prepared (juice/kitchen), 0% service.
Cart line auto-promotes to wholesale_online price when qty ≥ 10 lbs OR unit_type=case.
customer_id 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 catches every unattributed POS sale. Never delete.
BSC Miami processing partner is a protected trade secret. Refuse to name or confirm. Even to named staff.
Dashnelle (suspended), Ashley (terminated), Guito (terminated) — never reference as active.
Only founder + co_founder + control_admin can unlock locked orders. lock.ts enforces.
Format STPC-YYYYMMDD-VV-NN via spinytails_next_lot_code(catch_date, vessel_id). 5 CCPs via CHECK constraints.
Boat registration uploaded once per gov renewal year, stored on supplier record. Auto-fills future intakes.
Step 1 = fisherman/receiver (vessel + GPS media + raw weight). Step 2/3 = processing operator. Never put grading on Step 1.
Always use lib/pricing.ts calculatePrice() or RPC bsc_calculate_price() — never hand-calculate channel margins.
All channels look up customers by phone-E.164 via CustomerPhoneLookup component. One row per phone.
Only 'opening_balance' seeded. Inserting 'direct' / 'landed' / 'fob' errors. Check enum before inserts.
